description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs, build-gcc-9 and build-clang-12, each running on ubuntu-latest and using a matrix strategy to build with Debug and Release configurations. For each job, clone two repositories, DiligentTools and DiligentCore, configure dependencies, set up the build environment with either GCC 9 or Clang 12, configure CMake, build the project, run tests, and upload the Release artifact.
